title: crotalaria cylindrocarpa
intro: Crotalaria cylindrocarpa, also known as the cylindrical pod bush or cylindrical seed pod, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria cylindrocarpa include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat wounds and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria cylindrocarpa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
